payload.answer: Not grounded. The claim "No conflicts recorded" is only supported if conflict links were actually checked; that verification is not established here.
citations: "Evidence only supports this if conflict links were checked."

repair_options: Verify whether conflict links were explicitly checked before asserting that no conflicts are recorded.
